name: trvon/yams
description: Content-addressed storage with SHA-256 hashing and block-level dedup. More 'smart git' than traditional memory system.
approachDetail: SHA-256 content hashing, block-level dedup, more 'smart git' than memory
searchDetail: SQLite FTS5 with optional vector search layer
contextInjectionDetail: Agent calls MCP tools to store and retrieve content-addressed blocks
auditTrailDetail: Content-addressed SHA-256 hashing means old content is never overwritten (immutable blocks)
